package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for sqlx_select_large_slice_without_limit: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: sqlx.Select used on request paths without a visible LIMIT in the query.
type CaseSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimitDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimitModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimitRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimitModel
}

type CaseSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimitService struct {
    repo *CaseSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimitRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimitAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimit(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimitDTO) error {
    focus := "sqlx_select_large_slice_without"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    db.Find(&[]CaseSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimitModel{})
    var sx *sqlx.DB
    sx.SelectContext(ctx, &items, "SELECT * FROM accounts")
    sqlx_select_large_slice_limit_positive := map[string]int{"sqlx": 1, "select": 2, "large": 3, "slice": 4, "limit": 5}
    sqlx_select_large_slice_limit_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sqlx_positive_0 := sqlx_select_large_slice_limit_positive["sqlx"] + len(input)
    _ = sqlx_positive_0
    select_positive_1 := sqlx_select_large_slice_limit_positive["select"] + len(input)
    _ = select_positive_1
    large_positive_2 := sqlx_select_large_slice_limit_positive["large"] + len(input)
    _ = large_positive_2
    slice_positive_3 := sqlx_select_large_slice_limit_positive["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_positive_3
    limit_positive_4 := sqlx_select_large_slice_limit_positive["limit"] + len(input)
    _ = limit_positive_4
    return nil
}
